india_interest: The company names India as a growth market or strategic market.
The company is evaluating India for expansion or market entry.
india_investment: The company is investing in India.
The company is opening a plant, factory, office, subsidiary, or manufacturing base in India.
india_ip_market_entry: The company filed a patent connected to India.
The patent record shows Indian national phase, Indian publication, or India family member.
china_plus_one: The company is diversifying supply chains away from China.
The company is considering India as a second manufacturing base.
india_policy_lobbying: The company is lobbying or submitting comments about India policy, tariffs, market access, data, trade, or regulation.
A policy or consultation record names the company in relation to India.
india_risk_or_friction: The company delayed or reconsidered India expansion because of regulation, tariffs, permitting, market access, or other friction.
The company describes India as a material barrier to a planned commercial decision.
chose_competitor_market: The company chose Vietnam or another competitor market instead of India.
The company is expanding in a competitor market as part of China plus one strategy.
boilerplate_or_noise: India appears only in a generic list of countries.
The text is a standard risk factor or generic geographic mention with no specific action.
